$comment: Registry of every tool. The hub renders its cards from this and CI builds from this. route: 'mw' (scad listing on MakerWorld) | 'app' (own-site app) | 'both'. external: true = lives outside this monorepo.

generators.name: Washer Generator
generators.blurb: Washers in any dimension you need.

generators.name: Image to Clicker
generators.blurb: Turn any image into a satisfying clicker.

generators.name: Keycap Legend Generator
generators.blurb: Custom keycaps with icons, logos, or letters.
